RitualAttachableOutcomeEffectDef.label: Find liquid jade
RitualAttachableOutcomeEffectDef.effectDesc: A small amount of liquid jade will emerge from beneath the ground.
RitualAttachableOutcomeEffectDef.letterInfoText: A small amount of liquid jade will emerge from beneath the ground.

RitualAttachableOutcomeEffectDef.label: Qi nourishment
RitualAttachableOutcomeEffectDef.effectDesc: All cultivators restore their Qi and gain a slight improvement in their cultivation progress.
RitualAttachableOutcomeEffectDef.letterInfoText: All cultivators restore their Qi and gain a slight improvement in their cultivation progress.
